name: Lebanon
summary: Day 63 Thursday. KINETIC ONGOING — IDF CONTINUED STRIKES BEQAA + SOUTHERN LEBANON APR 27-29; HEZBOLLAH ROCKET/DRONE ATTACKS CONTINUE. Hezbollah SG Naim Qassem 'categorically rejects' Lebanon-Israel direct talks (Al Jazeera). Israel operating in security zone south of Litani, north of Litani, in Beqaa Valley, and northern Lebanon. 14-day Hezbollah-Israeli-civilian-casualty trigger remains at Day 5 of 14 (closes 2026-05-11). Per intel.md A9 UNCHANGED. PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): A civilian contractor working for Israel's Defense Ministry was killed Tuesday April 28 by Hezbollah drone in southern Lebanon (CONFIRMED — Haaretz, Times of Israel, UPI). PARTIAL TRIGGER ACTIVATION — strict reading does NOT activate Israeli civilian casualty trigger; maximalist reading DOES. Operative tag: edge weight increment 0.5-1.0 (partial activation), trigger remains at WATCHING (Day 4 of 14). The IDF struck 20+ Hezbollah-linked infrastructure sites across Beqaa Valley and southern Lebanon Mon-Tue. Israel's main bridges on the Litani River were BLOWN UP to cut south Lebanon from rest of country — geographic-expansion confirmation. Lebanese government has NOT formally responded to Litani bridge demolitions. Lebanese Health Ministry: 14 killed (incl 2 women, 2 children) and 37 wounded in Sunday April 26 strikes. Cumulative since March 2: 2,491 killed, 7,719 wounded. [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]

active_triggers.condition: Hezbollah-IDF kinetic produces Israeli civilian casualty within 14 days (by 2026-05-11) — full re-escalation activated

historical_summaries.summary: 6 signals. Israel launched ground incursion into southern Lebanon against Hezbollah | At least 41 killed in Israeli air attacks on Bekaa Valley | Lebanese PM Salam demanded Hezbollah surrender weapons and restrict to political activities

31 signals. Beirut airstrike killed Hezbollah's southern front commander Haj Youssef Ismail Hashem on April 1 — the most senior Hezbollah commander kill | Israel struck Lebanon April 1 concurrent with Trump primetime address and ongoing Iran campaign | Israeli strikes killed 2 girls and wounded 40 near Tyre
